title: Agricultural Equipment Operators
description: Drive and control equipment to support agricultural activities such as tilling soil; planting, cultivating, and harvesting crops; feeding and herding livestock; or removing animal waste. May perform tasks such as crop baling or hay bucking. May operate stationary equipment to perform post-harvest tasks such as husking, shelling, threshing, and ginning.

tasks.text: Load and unload crops or containers of materials, manually or using conveyors, handtrucks, forklifts, or transfer augers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix specified materials or chemicals, and dump solutions, powders, or seeds into planter or sprayer machinery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Spray fertilizer or pesticide solutions to control insects, fungus and weed growth, and diseases, using hand sprayers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe and listen to machinery operation to detect equipment malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manipulate controls to set, activate, and adjust mechanisms on machinery.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate or tend equipment used in agricultural production, such as tractors, combines, and irrigation equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust, repair, and service farm machinery and notify supervisors when machinery malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attach farm implements such as plows, discs, sprayers, or harvesters to tractors, using bolts and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load hoppers, containers, or conveyors to feed machines with products, using forklifts, transfer augers, suction gates, shovels, or pitchforks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct and monitor the activities of work crews engaged in planting, weeding, or harvesting activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate towed machines such as seed drills or manure spreaders to plant, fertilize, dust, and spray crops.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Weigh crop-filled containers, and record weights and other identifying information.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Walk beside or ride on planting machines while inserting plants in planter mechanisms at specified intervals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Drive trucks to haul crops, supplies, tools, or farm workers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Guide products on conveyors to regulate flow through machines, and to discard diseased or rotten products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Position boxes or attach bags at discharge ends of machinery to catch products, removing and closing full containers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Irrigate soil, using portable pipes or ditch systems, and maintain ditches or pipes and pumps.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
